title: Slavic Woman in Forest
prompt: an analogue photo of beautiful young female slavic with long white hair and pale skin, sits in the center of an old forest clearing. Around them sit foxes and deer with glowing eyes. Behind them is the black sun covered by a total eclipse. Old slavic clothes. Cinematic shot.
